outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Ceasefire tested as US warned the fight over Strait of Hormuz hasn't 'begun yet'
outlets.summary: CNN leads with ceasefire near collapse after US-Iran exchanged fire in Hormuz. Iran's parliament speaker Ghalibaf: 'We have not even begun yet.' Trump declines to confirm ceasefire. Oil surges to $113.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Attacks in Strait of Hormuz, Gulf region imperil U.S.-Iran ceasefire
outlets.summary: WaPo covers Project Freedom launch, 6 Iranian boats sunk, Iran's attack on UAE, and the disintegration of the April 8 ceasefire. Frames as potential return to full-scale hostilities.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: U.S. says the Iran ceasefire holds despite attacks in Strait of Hormuz and against UAE
outlets.summary: NPR carries Hegseth Pentagon briefing — 'ceasefire is not over,' 6 more blockade-runners stopped. Covers second-day UAE attacks, Oman strike, and Trump's Vatican rift. Notes oil prices easing as US says ceasefire holds.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump opens Hormuz under fire with 'Project Freedom' as Iran warns of attacks
outlets.summary: Fox frames Project Freedom as bold Trump leadership. Leads with 'blown off the face of the Earth' threat. Highlights US military success sinking 6 Iranian boats. Iran 'now more malleable.'

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: US Destroys Six Iranian Ships In Strait Of Hormuz During 'Project Freedom'
outlets.summary: Daily Caller emphasizes US military dominance — 6 boats destroyed, all threats neutralized. Frames as vindication of Trump's aggressive approach to reopening the strait.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US intercepts 6 ships trying to run American blockade, Hegseth says
outlets.summary: Fox covers Hegseth Pentagon briefing — 6 more blockade-runners stopped, US 'locked and loaded.' Frames Project Freedom as decisive Trump leadership keeping the seas open.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: 'Dangerous escalation': World condemns Iran after attacks on UAE
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera leads with universal world condemnation of Iran's missile/drone attacks on UAE. G7, EU, UK, France, Germany all issue statements. Covers Fujairah oil fire and ceasefire collapse.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran says US military killed five civilians in attacks on passenger boats
outlets.summary: Covers Iran's counter-narrative claiming US attacked civilian boats from Khasab (Oman), not IRGC fast boats. 5 civilians allegedly killed. CENTCOM denies. Competing claims unresolved.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Iran's Foreign Minister Heads to China for First Time Since War
outlets.summary: Bloomberg covers Araghchi's first Beijing visit since the war began. Talks with FM Wang Yi on bilateral relations and regional developments amid Project Freedom escalation.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Israel, US said readying potential new strikes on Iran in order to pressure it in talks
outlets.summary: ToI leads with Israel-US coordination on potential 'short campaign' against Iran. Targets include missile launchers and energy sites. Decision rests with Trump. Covers Project Freedom and UAE attack.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Don't Downplay the Risk: Iran and Trump Are One Step Away From All-out Regional War
outlets.summary: Haaretz editorial warns ceasefire is collapsing and full regional war is imminent. Critical of both Trump's escalatory rhetoric and Israel's strike planning.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian brands IRGC escalation 'madness' as tensions rise in Tehran
outlets.summary: Iran International leads with internal power struggle — Pezeshkian calling IRGC UAE strikes 'completely irresponsible.' Reveals deep rift between civilian government and military. IRGC acted without government knowledge.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran's labor market cracking under layoffs and inflation
outlets.summary: Reports on Iran's deteriorating economy — mass layoffs, inflation, Supreme Leader's call for 'economic jihad.' Blockade causing severe domestic economic pain. Khamenei asks business owners to avoid layoffs.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran reaffirms Strait of Hormuz control as US pressure backfires
outlets.summary: Press TV (via GlobalSecurity) frames Project Freedom as US 'delirium.' Reaffirms IRGC's claimed control of Hormuz traffic; carries Iranian army chief comments and government denials of UAE attacks.
